# App switcher Reviewed & Ranked for 2026

Last updated
:   Jun 25, 2026

Based on
:   340 reviews

Products considered
:   195

App switchers centralize launching, switching, and actions across apps. Expect hotkeys, sidebars, and automation for builders, marketers, and power users.

RaycastAlfredfocusedOSSetappDisplaygoManganum sidebar for Google Chrome

Explore related categories

•See all [...] Top reviewed

Across leading app-switcher tools, the strongest options split between broad command launchers, window-level navigation, and browser-centric consolidation. Raycast suits keyboard-first users who want search, automation, and extensions in one hub; AltTab focuses on fast visual window switching on macOS; Manganum sidebar for Google Chrome keeps Gmail, calendar, tasks, and AI tools accessible without tab hopping.
